title: Inheritance 🧬
description: Build new classes from existing ones.

slides.title: Inheritance — Reuse & Extend 🧬
Inheritance Demo 🎬

quizData.question: What does super() do?
quizData.explanation: super() accesses the parent class, usually to call its __init__ or other methods.

quizData.question: What is it called when a child class redefines a parent method?
quizData.explanation: When a child class provides its own version of a parent method, it's called overriding.
